entities.name: PONGAMIA GLABRA
entities.description: A tree species whose seeds, bark, and leaves were analyzed for nitrification inhibitors.

entities.name: NITRIFICATION INHIBITORS
entities.description: Substances that slow down the conversion of ammonium to nitrate in the soil.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the manurial value of P. glabra seed-cake is recognized.

entities.name: SEED-CAKE
entities.description: The byproduct of oil extraction from P. glabra seeds used as a fertilizer.

entities.name: OXIDATION OF NH4-N
entities.description: The chemical process of converting ammonium nitrogen into nitrate.

entities.name: NH4-N
entities.description: Ammonium nitrogen, the form of nitrogen subject to nitrification.

entities.name: AMMONIACAL FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Fertilizers that provide nitrogen in the form of ammonium.

entities.name: SEED EXTRACT
entities.description: An alcoholic extract derived from P. glabra seeds.

entities.name: BARK EXTRACT
entities.description: An extract derived from the bark of P. glabra.

entities.name: DRIED LEAVES
entities.description: The dried foliage of P. glabra.

entities.name: LABORATORY EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Controlled tests conducted using soil samples to evaluate nitrification inhibition.
